summary: Tested Bookvia per-business public_code (BV-XXXXX) feature end-to-end. All 10 backend tests passed (1 skipped: admin endpoint covered separately via curl since TOTP-based fixture wasn't in scope). Frontend BusinessSettings public-code card and Admin Dashboard code badges all verified working.

backend.TestBackfill::test_every_business_has_pu: PASS - all 5 MX businesses have BV-XXXXX format codes
backend.TestNewRegistration::test_new_business_h: PASS - new biz auto-assigned BV-XXXXX, verified via direct MongoDB lookup; cleaned up after test
backend.TestAdminSearch::test_admin_search_by_co: SKIPPED in pytest; verified via curl: search=BV-QFC6D returns exactly 1 biz (Test Real Stripe), search=QFC partial also returns 1

frontend.BusinessSettings public-code-card: PASS - card visible at top of Info tab
frontend.Admin /bv-ctrl Negocios tab: PASS - 20 admin-biz-code-{id} badges visible (BV-FHDPH, BV-4T9BB, BV-VTDQQ, etc.)
frontend.Admin search placeholder text: PASS - 'Buscar por nombre, email, telefono o codigo BV-XXXXX...'
frontend.Admin search submission: Backend search by BV-QFC6D returns single matching biz (verified via API); search input is filled but requires explicit 'Buscar' button click to apply (standard UX pattern, not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: Generator uses cryptographically secure secrets.choice with retry loop - good. 28^5 ~= 17M space gives near-zero collision risk.
Backfill on startup is idempotent (sparse unique index + only fills missing). Looks safe.
by-code endpoint correctly returns 400 for invalid format vs 404 for not-found - good HTTP semantics.
Test data accumulating in DB (multiple TEST_* businesses with codes visible in admin list). Consider periodic cleanup but not blocking.
test_credentials: Business: testbiz_dashboard@test.com / TestBiz123! (BV-4T9BB). Admin: zamorachapa50@gmail.com / RainbowLol3133! + TOTP via /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py. Admin login URL is /bv-ctrl/login (NOT /admin/login). Admin dashboard at /bv-ctrl.
seed_data_creation: Test created one business (TEST_pubcode_<uuid>@test.com) and cleaned it up via direct MongoDB delete in fixture. Older TEST_PubCode_* entries from other test runs remain visible in admin list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public code feature works end-to-end. Login response field is 'token'. Admin login uses /api/auth/admin/login with totp_code field. Admin pages live at /bv-ctrl* (not /admin*). The admin search input requires clicking 'Buscar' button to submit (standard UX). All BV-XXXXX badges/cards properly rendered with data-testids: public-code-card, public-code-value, copy-public-code-btn, admin-biz-code-{biz.id}.
